whats_new:
- Vendor payment questions now correctly query vendor bills instead of customer invoices
- Fixed: payments applied to a specific invoice were returning zero results due to a wrong join key between payment tables
- Fixed: "bills due this week" and similar queries now correctly handle bills with no payment terms set in EBMS
- Fixed: early payment discount queries now use the discount deadline, not the final payment due date
- Fixed: payroll averages and counts now correctly include only finalized paychecks, not in-progress or voided entries
- "Last pay period" queries now use the actual pay period from EBMS instead of an approximate date range
- Fixed: job name lookups (e.g. "hours on the Riverside job") now resolve correctly through the job code
- Fixed: questions asking for a count or breakdown by category now use grouped totals instead of a row list that could be truncated
- Fixed: "slowest payers" and similar date-difference queries no longer error on the days calculation
- Deleted/merged customer records no longer appear in customer lists and lookups
- Business questions phrased in industry language (menu items, collections, payroll spend, gross margin) are now always answered directly
